notes: No machine-readable spec (OpenAPI/Swagger/Postman) exists for the InSTEDD Resource Map REST API. Authored a focused OpenAPI 3.0.3 by hand from the vendor REST API wiki. The adaptor itself only calls POST /api/collections/{collection_id}/sites.json (the submitSite operation); the other endpoints (collections list/detail/count/geo, single site get/delete/update_property/partial_update, layers/fields, site histories, memberships) are documented from the wiki to provide realistic seed shapes for the mocker. Auth is HTTP Basic (email/password) and baseUrl is per-deployment (default https://resourcemap.instedd.org). Response schemas are approximate: the wiki gives field names but few complete example payloads, so property shapes are inferred.
